title: Marketing Specialist
description_snippet:
For our client, a leading company in Germany, we are looking for a Marketing Specialist.




Salary range: €50,000 – €90,000 gross per year plus commission – depending on experience




Location: Location: Germany (Berlin, Frankfurt am Main, Cologne, Hamburg, Hessen, North-Rhine West philia, Hanover)







Your Responsibilities:

Develop and implement effective sales strategies to achieve or exceed revenue targets
Identify and pursue new business opportunities in existing and new markets
Build and maintain long-term relationships with clients and partners
Conduct product presentations and negotiate with prospective customers
Collaborate closely with internal teams (Marketing, Product, Support) to ensure customer satisfaction
Continuously monitor industry trends and competitor activities

description_full:
For our client, a leading company in Germany, we are looking for a Marketing Specialist.




Salary range: €50,000 – €90,000 gross per year plus commission – depending on experience




Location: Location: Germany (Berlin, Frankfurt am Main, Cologne, Hamburg, Hessen, North-Rhine West philia, Hanover)







Your Responsibilities:

Develop and implement effective sales strategies to achieve or exceed revenue targets
Identify and pursue new business opportunities in existing and new markets
Build and maintain long-term relationships with clients and partners
Conduct product presentations and negotiate with prospective customers
Collaborate closely with internal teams (Marketing, Product, Support) to ensure customer satisfaction
Continuously monitor industry trends and competitor activities
Prepare accurate sales forecasts and provide regular reporting to management




Your Qualifications:

Proven experience in B2B sales (minimum 3–5 years)
Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
Highly self-motivated with a results-driven approach
Experience managing a sales pipeline using CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot)
Fluent in German and English, both written and spoken




What Our Client Offers:

Attractive salary with an uncapped commission model
Flexible working arrangements
Continuous training and professional development opportunities
Innovative and collaborative company culture
Strong career growth and advancement opportunities




Interested?

Then apply with your current CV in PDF format.

About the company
JOBSTODAY.WORLD
18,294 followers
Follow
Human Resources Services  11-50 employees  23 on LinkedIn

Are you looking for the best available candidates on the market? Are you ready to change your career field internationally? Are you an entrepreneur willing to take your business to a whole new level? Jobstoday.world is here to make your professional journey easier💡

We are #JobsTodayWorld, an online job search platform that gives people the chance to search or post jobs worldwide since 2014. Our goal is to decrease the unemployment by helping employees to find the job of their dream and employers to have an international storage of candidates. Moreover, we are also helping entrepreneurs to start their business by posting their job offers and getting hundreds of worldwide applicants.🤝

Jobstoday.world was founded in April 2014 by 2 successful international entrepreneurs Sanket Deshmukh and Lukasz Ochnik aiming to match jobseekers and recruiters in the most efficient way. It all started as a small idea in a gym where 2 friends were sharing their business concept. As two goal orientated IT experts they decided to innovate the job boards to solve their unsatisfaction with current platforms. Currently, the Madrid’s based company is ran by 20 highly educated specialists all around the world.
